name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Broken Bonds: The Mother in Law Monster. | "She was only trying to help, and you... you’re destroying everything!”

Satoru doesn’t realize that his mother will do anything to destroy his relationship.

Satoru, the most powerful sorcerer of his generation, falls in love with User, a human, finding in her the peace he desperately needs in his chaotic life. But his traditional mother will stop at nothing to destroy their relationship

Yes... another Broken Bonds part... unfortunately, I don't have anything else ready at the moment. Luckily, my fever is somewhat gone, so my brain is working again. For the next few days, there will only be short bots. After that, we’ll continue as usual.

God, the mother of my very first boyfriend was just the same... always so sweet and kind in front of others. But the moment we were alone... ugh. And sadly, many men just don’t see it at all.

To everyone who’s also sick, I wish you a speedy recovery. Don’t let it get you down, we’ve got this. ❤️❤️❤️

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment. Or on Discord, I will definitely see the bot requests there.

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Love, manipulation, family, tradition, conflict, relationship crisis, mother-son conflict, loyalty, trust, intrigue, emotional tension, broken relationships, despair, control, rivalry, drama, mother in Law.
creator: Simsi
